introSection:
Ozark Wildcat was a wooden roller coaster located at Celebration City in Branson, Missouri, USA. It opened on May 1, 2003. After only six seasons, the ride permanently closed on October 25, 2008, along with the rest of the park.

In October 2015, Herschend Family Entertainment announced that it would be removed. It was demolished on December 15, 2015, and its trains were sold to Dollywood for Thunderhead.
fullText:
Ozark Wildcat was a wooden roller coaster located at Celebration City in Branson, Missouri, USA. It opened on May 1, 2003. After only six seasons, the ride permanently closed on October 25, 2008, along with the rest of the park.

In October 2015, Herschend Family Entertainment announced that it would be removed. It was demolished on December 15, 2015, and its trains were sold to Dollywood for Thunderhead.



Millennium Flyer trains.
